_note: Reference-only prompt pack. These entries are NOT runnable Claude Code hooks — they are short reminders you can paste into a session at the relevant moment, fold into CLAUDE.md as durable instructions, or wrap in a small Node hook that prints the text to stderr from a PreToolUse/Stop hook.
_overlap: Functionally redundant with the active stack: pre-write-guard overlaps with scripts/hooks/doc-file-warning.js plus the 'Block large file creation' recipe in hooks/README.md; review-on-stop overlaps with scripts/hooks/check-console-log.js and the quality-gate post-edit hook. Keep this file only as a quick prompt source.

PreToolUse._prompt:
Before this write, check ALL of the following in one pass:
1. SIZE — If the content exceeds 800 lines, BLOCK the write. Split into focused modules under 400 lines.
2. SECRETS — No hardcoded API keys, tokens, passwords, or connection strings. Use env vars.
3. DOC LOCATION — If creating a .md or .txt file outside docs/, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, or LICENSE, warn that docs should go in docs/.
Only report issues found. If all checks pass, proceed silently.

Stop._prompt: Briefly review the completed work: 1) any security issues 2) proper error handling 3) no leftover console.log 4) tests needed for changes. Report issues only.
